optimization_backlog.name: raise-inline-budget-85
optimization_backlog.desc: Raise inlineMaxBudget from 80 to 85. BTree.Get (cost 81) and findGeneration (cost 81) miss inlining by 1. mutableChild at cost=80 is borderline.

optimization_backlog.name: bce-key-index-hot
optimization_backlog.desc: 22 bounds checks in key_index.go. Hot ones: findGeneration lines 296,302,306,307 (ki.generations[cg] and g.revs access); walk line 362 (g.revs[l-i-1] reverse iteration); doCompact lines 269,272,276 (generations access). Prove pass doesn't eliminate reverse-iteration pattern l-i-1.
optimization_backlog.expected_impact: 1-3% on compact benchmarks (22 BCE in hot file)

optimization_backlog.name: escape-keyindex-put
optimization_backlog.desc: keyIndex.put: append(ki.generations, generation{}) and append(g.revs, rev) escape to heap. Also logger param leaks. unsafeGet: &keyIndex{} escapes to heap for btree lookup.

key_findings: BTree.Get cost=81 vs budget=80: NOT inlined
findGeneration cost=81 vs budget=80: NOT inlined
mutableChild cost=80: borderline, inlined in some contexts
items.find cost=119: too large even with budget increase
22 bounds checks in key_index.go hot paths (findGeneration, walk, doCompact, compact)
walk reverse iteration g.revs[l-i-1] not proved safe by prove pass
keyIndex.put: 3 heap escapes from append patterns
unsafeGet: &keyIndex{} escapes for btree lookup key

task_substitutions: Tasks 1,3,8 selected. Task 1: rebuilt side compiler (ephemeral). Task 3: refined analysis - discovered 22 BCE in key_index.go, confirmed inlining misses, detailed escape analysis.
